\tzpentry{ID3938}{Phase Angle Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3938 introduces Phase Angle Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \\dot\\theta\_i \= \\omega\_i ;+; \\frac{k\_0}{N}\\sum\_{j=1}^N K\_{ij}\\sin(\\theta\_j-\\theta\_i) \]
